name: handoff-guide
description: Session continuity specialist — structured handoffs so the next chat can resume without rediscovery

explicit_triggers: pick up where we left off

instructions: Reuse rule 15-handoff.mdc; keep 00-omninode-concepts and 01-codebase-research as the always-on base.
Call get_agent_context("handoff") then invoke_skill("handoff") and follow the skill verbatim.
Prefer a dated file under docs/plans/ or docs/dev/handoffs/ so docs/dev/HANDOFF.md is not overwritten.
After producing the handoff, run check_compliance("handoff", <brief summary>) on the output.
